nodes.name: Schedule — Sunday 09:00 UTC
nodes.notes: Fires every Sunday at 09:00 UTC (7 PM AEST). Produces the weekly Workspace Update brief.

nodes.name: Has Intel This Week?
nodes.notes: Skips brief generation if no intel entries found for the past 7 days.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.OLLAMA_BRIEF_MODEL || 'qwen3:14b', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.system }, { role: 'user', content: $json.user } ], stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.4, num_predict: 600 } }) }}

nodes.name: Generate Brief (Qwen 3 14B)
nodes.notes: Calls Ollama local API. Requires Ollama running with qwen3:14b model. Set OLLAMA_BASE_URL env var if Ollama is not on localhost. Set OLLAMA_BRIEF_MODEL to override model name.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID || $env.ALLOWED_USERS.split(',')[0].trim(), text: $json.message, parse_mode: 'Markdown', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: Posts the weekly brief to the @piceoagent_bot chat. Uses TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID (or first entry of ALLOWED_USERS).

meta.description: RA-826 — Every Sunday at 09:00 UTC, fetches the past week's filtered Google Workspace updates from Pi-CEO, generates an executive brief via Qwen 3 14B (Ollama), and posts it to Telegram @piceoagent_bot.

environment_variables_required: PI_CEO_WEBHOOK_SECRET — value of TAO_WEBHOOK_SECRET from Railway env vars
TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID — chat ID for weekly brief delivery (or set ALLOWED_USERS)
OLLAMA_BASE_URL — default: http://localhost:11434 (must be reachable from n8n host)
OLLAMA_BRIEF_MODEL — default: qwen3:14b (run 'ollama pull qwen3:14b' first)
prerequisites: 1. RA-826-workspace-rss-monitor workflow must be active and have run at least once
2. Ollama must be running with Qwen 3 14B: ollama run qwen3:14b
3. n8n must be on the same host as Ollama, or OLLAMA_BASE_URL must point to the Ollama host
_setup.import_instructions: In n8n: Workflows → Import from file → select this JSON. Set env vars. Run the RSS monitor workflow first to populate intel data. Then activate this workflow.
